plays.name: Through Ball Into Space
plays.description: Home #10 carries into midfield and threads a through ball behind the defensive line for striker #9, who has timed a run into open space.

plays.name: Risky Central Pass
plays.description: Home #6 is under pressure on the ball. The central pass to #10 is tempting but the lane is congested; the wider outlet is the lower-risk progressive option.

plays.name: Missed Wide Option
plays.description: Home #8 looks central where defenders are packed, but winger #11 is wide open with a clear lane in the final third — the higher-value option that was missed.

plays.name: Real Match: A-League Counter-Attack
plays.description: Real broadcast-tracking possession — Newcastle United Jets FC build an attack against Auckland FC (A-League 2024/25). Positions are interpolated from SkillCorner tracking; the same analytics are applied.
